nasb.text: He also took up the mantle of Elijah that fell from him and returned and stood by the bank of the Jordan.

esv.text: And he took up the cloak of Elijah that had fallen from him and went back and stood on the bank of the Jordan.

cnv.text: 他拾起以利亞身上掉下來的外衣，就回去，站在約旦河河邊。

ccb.text: 他拿起以利亚身上掉下来的外衣，回到约旦河边，
